entryTemplate.title: Short release title
entryTemplate.summary: One to two lines describing what changed and why it matters.

entries.title: Deeper release notes with merged product history
entries.summary: Changelog merges git history from the status site and the briefpk news app (when build runs next to the app clone), groups customer-facing cards by week, and adds expandable full change lists. Regenerate with node scripts/build-changelog-history.mjs; set BRIEFPK_APP_REPO if repos are not siblings.

entries.title: Canonical premium footer on public app and status site
entries.summary: Shared multi-column footer (brand, Network, Research, Legal, Aggregated Intelligence strip) on briefpk public pages via canonical-footer.css; status index and changelog aligned to the same layout.

entries.title: Public data hardening for status surface
entries.summary: Removed internal AI routing/provider details from public UI and artifacts, scrubbed legacy fields, and simplified sensitive wording.

entries.title: Mobile-first layout and touch UX refresh
entries.summary: Improved responsive spacing, safe-area behavior, table scrolling, and small-screen card wrapping for better phone usability.

entries.title: Clarified login health messaging
entries.summary: Updated status UI language so login health rows are easier to understand without exposing implementation details.

entries.title: Custom domain routing updated
entries.summary: CNAME configuration was updated to point Pages traffic to the status domain setup.

entries.title: Login health fallback telemetry stabilized
entries.summary: Added resilient login health fallback and improved light theme panel behavior while upstream health payloads were rolling out.

entries.title: Login health checks integrated into core grid
entries.summary: Surfaced login page, magic link, and Google OAuth checks as first-class service components in status reporting.

entries.title: Major status UI overhaul and branding pass
entries.summary: Introduced GitHub-style component grid, incident banner, uptime bars, and aligned typography/colors with the core briefpk brand.

entries.title: Defensive frontend null-checks for stability
entries.summary: Added guardrails in app rendering to prevent panel crashes when partial status payloads are returned.

entries.title: Search API included in monitoring stack documentation
entries.summary: Expanded runbook coverage to include merged news/search endpoint observability expectations.

entries.title: Premium light theme redesign
entries.summary: Shifted status presentation to a cleaner premium light theme with better visual hierarchy.

entries.title: Mission-control analytics era launched
entries.summary: Introduced AI router control tower, user journey pulse, and richer synthetic component health analytics.

entries.title: Branded briefpk status site launched on GitHub Pages
entries.summary: Initial public launch of the status site with component-level health reporting and uptime artifacts.

entries.title: Continuous synthetic snapshot automation (ongoing)
entries.summary: Recurring `chore(status): update synthetic status snapshot` commits keep public artifacts current for operations transparency.
